texto: The physical stage of bonding is at its most powerful when all other forms of bonding have been achieved. If this has been done, the final petals of the flower have reached full maturity and unfold, leaving no restriction for pleasure, physical or otherwise. Having learned your partner and when to push, pull away or work together in fluid unison; having learned what enthuses and delights their senses, you are prepared to carry all of this knowledge into the sweet cadence of your unity.
explicacao: Citação de Shykia Bell sobre temas ligados a sabedoria. “The physical stage of bonding is at its most powerful when all other forms of bonding have been a…” articula sabedoria, camile, intimacy em registro de sabedoria, com relevância para contextos como trabalho e intimacy.
